headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Stanley Black & Decker, Core & Main, Kennametal and Enerpac Tool Group
summary: Stanley Black & Decker and peers eye growth as manufacturing rebounds, though inflation and labor shortages continue to pressure margins.

headline: Is Stanley Black & Decker Stock Underperforming the Dow?
summary: Stanley Black & Decker has lagged the broader Dow Jones Industrial Average over the past year, though analysts maintain a cautiously optimistic outlook on its future performance.
